nodes.label: Phaltiel
nodes.description: Deliverance of the Lord, the son of Laish of Gallim (1 Sam. 25:44)= Phaltiel (2 Sam. 3:15). Michal, David’s wife, was given to him.

verses.text: But Saul had given Michal his daughter, David’s wife, to Phalti the son of Laish, which was of Gallim.
And Ishbosheth sent, and took her from her husband, even from Phaltiel the son of Laish.
